title: Selling Online Without Gumroad: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Are you a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan struggling to sell your ebooks, courses, or art due to PayPal restrictions? Or maybe you're in a country where Stripe isn't available to use for online transactions. Gumroad has blocked your account, and you're left with no alternative to sell your digital products. You're not alone. Many creators face similar challenges when trying to monetize their work online. It's time to explore alternative solutions to get paid for your digital products without relying on PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip have strict rules and restrictions that can block creators from certain countries. PayPal has a list of restricted countries, while Stripe's documentation warns of potential account freezes in case of 'suspicious activity.' Gumroad's platform restrictions limit sales in several countries, while Payhip's requirements for digital product sellers can be overwhelming. Meanwhile, NOWPayments offers a cryptocurrency payment solution that doesn't require KYC verification, allowing creators to get paid without the need for a complex setup. Web3 Wallet Connect, a frontend wallet integration tool, provides a seamless payment experience for buyers, enabling them to pay in multiple cryptocurrencies.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

The key to selling digital products in restricted countries lies in understanding the payment processors' limitations. PayPal's restrictions cover over 100 countries, while Stripe's limitations are more nuanced, often related to banking and regulatory issues. Gumroad's blocked countries list is extensive, including many African and Asian nations. In contrast, NOWPayments doesn't require KYC verification, making it a reliable option for creators in restricted countries. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can accept payments in multiple cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and others, giving you more flexibility in your sales.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, the differences between options become stark. PayPal's fees can range from 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction, while Stripe's fees vary depending on the plan and transaction type. Gumroad's fees are also a percentage of the sale, often higher than the competition. In contrast, NOWPayments offers a flat fee of 0.5% per transaction, with instant settlements and no hidden fees. Web3 Wallet Connect integrates seamlessly with NOWPayments, ensuring that you receive your payments quickly and without any additional fees.
PayPal's restrictions cover over 100 countries, limiting creators' ability to sell digital products online.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Selling digital products requires automation and delivery capabilities that are often lacking in traditional payment processors. Gumroad's automated delivery features are limited, while PayPal's API is notoriously difficult to integrate. Stripe's API is more user-friendly, but its limitations still apply. NOWPayments, on the other hand, offers automated delivery capabilities that integrate seamlessly with Web3 Wallet Connect. This means that you can set up automatic sales and delivery of your digital products with ease, without worrying about complex setup or integration issues.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Choosing the right option depends on your specific situation and needs. If you're a creator in a restricted country, NOWPayments and Web3 Wallet Connect are a winning combination. If you're looking for a seamless payment experience with low fees, NOWPayments is the way to go. If you need automated delivery capabilities, Web3 Wallet Connect is the tool to choose. Whatever your needs, NOWPayments and Web3 Wallet Connect offer a reliable, KYC-free, and cryptocurrency-friendly solution for selling digital products online.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
NOWPayments offers a flat fee of 0.5% per transaction, with instant settlements and no hidden fees.
